R15: | β-estradiol | 10 mM | 100 nM | 1 uL | -80.0 | Sigma, E2758-1G | Antioxidant ; mitogenic | The working concentration was calculated incorrectly as 10 nM, but was just adjusted. However, the volume that was added into the media was correct. This was just a typo (10.03.2025, MH/AE)
R16: | Neuregulin-1 / 
Heregulin | 6.6 uM / 
50 ug/ mL | 5 nM | 76 uL | -80.0 | Peprotech, 100-03 | Ligands for ERBB2, -3, -4; induces growth?
R17: | EGF | 100 ug/mL | 5 ng/mL | 5 uL | -80.0 | Peprotech, AF-100-15 | growth factor for (pluripotent) stem cells | NOTE! 30.12.2019 - 2.2.2022 experiments there as 10x concentrated EGF due to a calculation error. 
New aliquots of 100 ug/ mL EGF were prepared 3.2.2022 | The volume to be added into the media was twice the right amount, and we found out today (10.03.2025, MH/AE). Experiments that were done before (S526, S530 at least for sure) were done with this volume, so twice the right amount. Volume has been now corrected
